mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_long_term_memory ( tenant_id, user_id, memory_type, memory_key, memory_value, confidence, source, expire_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{userId}, #{memoryType}, #{memoryKey}, #{memoryValue}, #{confidence}, #{source}, #{expireAt}, NOW(), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE memory_value = VALUES(memory_value), confidence = GREATEST(confidence, VALUES(confidence)), source = VALUES(source), expire_at = VALUES(expire_at), updated_at = NOW()

INSERT INTO t_long_term_memory ( tenant_id, user_id, memory_type, memory_key, memory_value, confidence, source, expire_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{userId}, #{memoryType}, #{memoryKey}, #{memoryValue}, #{confidence}, #{source}, #{expireAt}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM t_long_term_memory WHERE expire_at IS NOT NULL AND expire_at < NOW()
